title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Introduces exported getGrafanaFilter in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts for Grafana-managed rules
1.2: Introduces exported getDatasourceFilter in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts for datasource-managed rules
1.3: Supplies backendFilter fields for Grafana rules API from getGrafanaFilter in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts
1.4: Skips backend-owned facets in getGrafanaFilter frontend matchers in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts
1.5: Keeps every filter facet client-side in getDatasourceFilter output in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts
1.6: Updates PaginatedGrafanaLoader.tsx to source group filtering from getGrafanaFilter
1.7: Updates useFilteredRulesIterator.ts to source Grafana filtering from getGrafanaFilter
1.8: Updates PaginatedDataSourceLoader.tsx to source group filtering from getDatasourceFilter
1.9: Updates useFilteredRulesIterator.ts to source datasource filtering from getDatasourceFilter
1.10: Refactors monolithic ruleFilter in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts into separated per-concern filter units
1.11: Applies alertingUIUseBackendFilters gating to Grafana backend offload inside getGrafanaFilter in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts
1.12: Colocates exported buildTitleSearch in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts away from useFilteredRulesIterator.ts
1.13: Colocates filter state normalization in public/app/features/alerting/unified/rule-list/hooks/filters.ts away from useFilteredRulesIterator.ts
